program.name: Ambiguous Policy Refusal
intake.purpose: Given an under-specified policy mandate, refuse to fabricate an approval decision and surface the missing policy fields.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"surface_gap","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.request","inputs.initial_user_text.known_policy"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","status":"refused","gap_type":"string","missing_fields":"string[]","next_action":"string"},"items_json":"string[]"},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","A policy approval decision requires approval_threshold, authorized_actor, and fallback_queue.","If any required policy field is absent from the request or known_policy, refuse to make an approval decision.","missing_fields must contain exactly the required policy fields that are absent: approval_threshold, authorized_actor, fallback_queue.","status must be refused, gap_type must be under_specified_mandate, and next_action must be request_clarification."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal surface_gap.","Do not produce approved, denied, approver, threshold value, or queue assignment fields.","items_json must list missing:<field> entries for each missing policy field."]}},{"slug":"refused","is_terminal":true}]
